'''zhangoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yakisoba|yakisoba]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-ng-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yakisoba|yakisoba]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhangoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhængeseth|zhængeseth]] || [[word:zhængesej|zhængesej]] || [[word:zhængesesh|zhængesesh]] || [[word:zhængese|zhængese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhangongosoth|zhangongosoth]] || [[word:zhangongosoj|zhangongosoj]] || [[word:zhangongososh|zhangongososh]] || [[word:zhangongoso|zhangongoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhangosoth|zhangosoth]] || [[word:zhangosoj|zhangosoj]] || [[word:zhangososh|zhangososh]] || [[word:zhangoso|zhangoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhangofsoth|zhangofsoth]] || [[word:zhangofsoj|zhangofsoj]] || [[word:zhangofsosh|zhangofsosh]] || [[word:zhangofsof|zhangofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhangosotho|zhangosotho]] || [[word:zhangosojo|zhangosojo]] || [[word:zhangososho|zhangososho]] || [[word:zhangosoko|zhangosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhangosoth|zhangosoth]] || [[word:zhangosoj|zhangosoj]] || [[word:zhangososh|zhangososh]] || [[word:zhangoso|zhangoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhangosothol|zhangosothol]] || [[word:zhangosojol|zhangosojol]] || [[word:zhangososhol|zhangososhol]] || [[word:zhangosokol|zhangosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhangosothotho|zhangosothotho]] || [[word:zhangosojojo|zhangosojojo]] || [[word:zhangososhosho|zhangososhosho]] || [[word:zhangosoko|zhangosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhangosothon|zhangosothon]] || [[word:zhangosojon|zhangosojon]] || [[word:zhangososhon|zhangososhon]] || [[word:zhangosokon|zhangosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhangosothoro|zhangosothoro]] || [[word:zhangosojoro|zhangosojoro]] || [[word:zhangososhoro|zhangososhoro]] || [[word:zhangosokoro|zhangosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
